items.title: Gradient Descent
items.description: SGD is the stochastic variant of gradient descent: same update rule θ ← θ − η∇L, but ∇L is estimated from a mini-batch instead of the full dataset.

items.title: Learning Rate
items.description: Mini-batch noise makes the choice of η critical; too large causes divergence, too small slows progress. Schedules and tuning are covered under learning rate.

items.title: Loading Data
items.description: Efficient SGD depends on data loaders that shuffle, batch, and prefetch examples—feeding the optimizer with correctly shaped mini-batches each step.

items.title: Early Stopping
items.description: SGD runs for many noisy epochs; monitoring validation loss and stopping when it worsens prevents overfitting to training mini-batch noise.
